summary: Move Action Plan Item within or across Sections
description: Move Action Plan Item within or across Action Plan Sections.

parameters.name: next_plan_item_id
parameters.description: ID of the Action Plan Item that will follow the newly moved Item. When moving an Item to the last position of the Section, do not provide this parameter.

parameters.name: plan_section_id
parameters.description: ID of the Action Plan Section the Item will move within or to
